description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a modern, minimalist design, featuring clean white exterior walls and a flat roof. The structure is L-shaped, with several distinct rooms visible from above, including what appears to be a main living area, bedrooms, and possibly a kitchen or utility space. Large window openings are present on some facades, allowing for natural light to enter the interior spaces. The building sits on a rectangular plot, with no visible landscaping or exterior ornamentation. The roof is flat and unadorned, consistent with contemporary architectural styles. The overall appearance is functional and streamlined, with an emphasis on geometric forms and open interior layouts.
description: A modern, L-shaped single-story bungalow with white walls, flat roof, and large window openings, designed for functional urban living.
description_view_0: This view shows the long side of the bungalow with several window openings and a clear view of the main living spaces.
description_view_1: From this angle, the L-shape is prominent, revealing the internal room divisions and the open layout of the central area.
description_view_2: This side highlights the extended wing of the bungalow, with fewer windows and a more enclosed appearance.
description_view_3: This perspective emphasizes the secondary wing and the flat roof, with visible separation between rooms and open areas.
